message.content:
Audit the Translation App in a VeloCMS PHP project for dead code, unused methods, unused imports, and redundancies. Search breadth: very thorough.

Project root: D:\Eigene Dateien\Webseiten\CMS\PHP\velocms

Files to audit (all of them):
- modules/Translation/Services/TranslationEngine.php
- core/Services/TranslationService.php
- modules/Translation/Models/TranslationModel.php
- modules/Translation/Controllers/AdminTranslationController.php
- modules/Translation/views/admin/translation/dashboard.php
- modules/Translation/views/admin/translation/editor.php
- modules/Translation/views/admin/translation/settings.php
- modules/Blog/Controllers/AdminBlogController.php
- modules/Pages/Controllers/AdminPagesController.php
- core/Controller.php
- core/functions.php (only the localized() and t() functions)

For each file report:
1. Any methods/functions defined but never called anywhere in the codebase
2. Any use/import statements that are never referenced in the file
3. Any variables assigned but never read
4. Any duplicate logic
5. Any debug/temporary code left in

For "never called" checks, also grep across the entire codebase to be sure.

Return a concise list: file → issue → verdict (remove / keep / investigate). No prose, just the findings.

attachment.content:
- dashboard-style: Ein poliertes, redaktionelles Light-Mode-Designsystem für HTML-Dashboards, Briefings, Berichte und visuelle Seiten. Liefert eine saubere redaktionelle Farbpalette (gebrochenes Weiß als Hintergrund, fast-schwarzer Text, graue Akzente, kein Orange) – adaptiert vom PDF-Guide-Skill. Verwende diesen Skill immer bei der Erstellung von HTML – Dashboards, Briefings, Berichte, Wrapups, Analyseseiten, visuelle Erklärseiten, Audit-Panels, Pipeline-Übersichten, Ressourcen-Landingpages. Trigger-Begriffe: "dashboard", "briefing", "bericht", "html-seite", "visuelle seite", "tagesabschluss", "wrapup", "morgen-briefing", "stats", "analytics", "auswertung".

- anthropic-skills:code-reviewer: Complete toolkit for automated code review with modern tools and best practices. Use this skill whenever the user wants to review code, analyze a pull request (PR), check code quality, generate a review report, detect anti-patterns, enforce coding standards, or audit a codebase for security/performance/maintainability issues. Trigger even for casual requests like "look at my code", "check this PR", "is this code good?", "find bugs in my file", or "what's wrong with this function". Covers TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Swift, Kotlin, React, Next.js, Node.js, GraphQL, and more. Always activate for any code quality, review, or analysis workflow.

Also trigger for TypeScript type design, accessibility audits, and responsive layout work. - update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review

content.text: Now let me verify the TranslationService's $options parameter usage more thoroughly:
Great! Now let me check if $options is ever passed by anyone:

Perfect! Now let me compile the comprehensive audit report:

## Audit Report: Translation App in VeloCMS

Based on my thorough search across the entire codebase, here are the findings:

---

### TranslationEngine.php

**File:** `modules/Translation/Services/TranslationEngine.php`

| Issue | Details | Verdict |
|-------|---------|---------|
| No unused methods | All public methods called: `translateUiStrings()` (AdminTranslationController), `translateRow()` (Blog, Pages, Nav controllers) | KEEP |
| No unused imports | Both imports used: `TranslationService`, `TranslationModel` | KEEP |
| Unused `$activeLangs` variable | Line 23: assigned but never used after filtering | REMOVE |
| Error logging is intentional | Lines 55, 113: logged for debugging exception messages | KEEP |

---

### TranslationService.php

**File:** `core/Services/TranslationService.php`

| Issue | Details | Verdict |
|-------|---------|---------|
| Unused `$options` parameter | Line 38: parameter in `translateBatch()` but never passed from any caller (TranslationEngine always calls without options argument) | REMOVE |
| Unused `glossary_id` check | Line 89-91: code checks for `$options['glossary_id']` but since `$options` is never populated by callers, this code is dead | REMOVE |
| No other unused methods | `translateBatchWithDeepL()`, `translateBatchWithAnthropic()`, `httpPost()` all private and used | KEEP |
| No unused imports | No use statements needed | KEEP |

---

### TranslationModel.php

**File:** `modules/Translation/Models/TranslationModel.php`

| Issue | Details | Verdict |
|-------|---------|---------|
| No unused methods | All methods called: `get()`, `upsert()`, `getForRow()` (Blog controller), `getStats()` (AdminTranslationController), `getList()`, `countList()`, `getTables()`, `getById()`, `updateManual()`, `unlock()` | KEEP |
| Private `buildWhere()` helper | Line 158: used only internally in 2 places (lines 95, 112) | KEEP |
| No unused imports | Only uses `Database` | KEEP |

---

### AdminTranslationController.php

**File:** `modules/Translation/Controllers/AdminTranslationController.php`

| Issue | Details | Verdict |
|-------|---------|---------|
| Private method `sanitizeLang()` | Line 178: used once in line 52 (editor action) | KEEP |
| Private method `buildEditorQs()` | Line 183: used twice (lines 91, 103 in saveTranslation/unlockTranslation) | KEEP |
| Private method `saveSetting()` | Line 168: used 5 times in saveSettings() action (lines 146-157) | KEEP |
| Duplicate language setup logic | Lines 28-33: same 4-line pattern repeated in Blog/Pages controllers → extract to shared helper | INVESTIGATE |
| All imports used | `Auth`, `Controller`, `Database`, `TranslationModel` all referenced | KEEP |

---

### AdminBlogController.php

**File:** `modules/Blog/Controllers/AdminBlogController.php`

| Issue | Details | Verdict |
|-------|---------|---------|
| Duplicate language extraction | Lines 31-33 in `new()`, lines 148-152 in `loadTranslations()`: identical 4-line pattern as TranslationEngine/AdminTranslationController | INVESTIGATE |
| Private method `collectData()` | Line 125: used in save() and update() actions | KEEP |
| Private method `loadTranslations()` | Line 146: used in edit() action | KEEP |
| Private method `saveManualTranslations()` | Line 165: used in update() action | KEEP |
| Private method `collectTranslatableFields()` | Line 196: used in save() and update() actions | KEEP |
| Private method `sanitizeSlug()` | Line 205: used in save() action and internally | KEEP |
| Unused import | `TranslationModel` imported (line 9) but only used in `loadTranslations()` for reading, never instantiated directly; could be optimized | INVESTIGATE |

---

### AdminPagesController.php

**File:** `modules/Pages/Controllers/AdminPagesController.php`

| Issue | Details | Verdict |
|-------|---------|---------|
| No duplicate language code | Uses TranslationEngine directly, no local language setup | KEEP |
| Unused import | `TranslationEngine` imported but used 2 times (lines 63, 127) | KEEP |
| All methods used | save(), delete(), editor APIs all called via routing | KEEP |

---

### Controller.php

**File:** `core/Controller.php`

| Issue | Details | Verdict |
|-------|---------|---------|
| Method `requireRole()` | Line 81: used in Admin controllers (Auth UserManagement, Contact, Settings, Sites, Translation) | KEEP |
